caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, large black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" printed in white on the front sits in a room filled with framed photographs on the walls. He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt and grey pants, and clothing racks are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular one on the left and one on the right that reads "Red Bull". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly from a neutral, focused look to a subtle smile. The setting remains static, with the camera fixed on the man as he talks into the microphone, while the background elements and logos remain unchanged.
